race.comment: Tough race. STRUGGLE STREET (7) was beaten at the picnics as a hot favourite two back then atoned with a Kyneton win last time. Had the big claim and now found form can run well again. LISTENING IS DOING (5) is also a last start winner, coming home at Pakenham to land the maiden win. Worth following up. SUPIDO'S CHOICE (2) wasn't far away in tougher company last time and has the blinkers added. Can do better. STEWART (9) ran on hard and just missed last time and shapes as one of the chances again. CASH CONVERTER (4) has gone well over a year since a win and resumes from a break with a solid fresh-up record. Among the chances.
